manifest.author: ioannisxirouxakis
manifest.changelog:
ioannisxirr's Instafel backup v56

- Replaced the old colour picker from the notes to a colour wheel above the bubble.
- Redesigned how your note details look after you have posted one.
- Cleaned up the Direct section a little bit, converting the search bar into a search button at the top left corner of the screen.
- Say hello to the avatar quests! Do the quests Meta mentions and get some extra avatar stickers! (please note that I haven't tested it a lot yet, so feel free to give feedback, thank you!)
- Minor changes and clean-ups
manifest.name: ioannisxir's Instafel Backup
manifest.description: Yeah, most popular backup in the world!
